name: Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Community Park in Bay City, TX! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Eastside
description: Come play pickleball at Eastside in Palacios, TX! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Palacios City Courts
description: Palacios City Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Palacios, TX. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
